name: Do AI referrals mean lower quality lawyers?
description: No, if humans oversee; check firm history.[4][1]

mainEntity.name: Do AI referrals mean lower quality lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, if humans oversee; check firm history.[4][1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not necessarily; AI streamlines like CloudLex but requires human oversight.[4] Factors: firm track record, verification processes. Top firms use AI ethically.[1] Vet via reviews, verdicts. Quality varies by firm, not tool.
